title: julostylis angustifolia
intro: Julostylis angustifolia is a plant species commonly known as the 'Wild Fennel' or 'Gurhal', which belongs to the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Julostylis angustifolia include its ability to act as a natural expectorant, helping to clear mucus and phlegm from the lungs, and its antiseptic properties, which can help to prevent infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Julostylis angustifolia can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, or used in a decoction to extract its medicinal properties.
